headline: Biogen Stock Gains Despite Extended FDA Review For Alzheimer's Therapy
summary: FDA extends review for Biogen's Leqembi Iqlik for early Alzheimer's disease to August 2026.

raw.headline: Biogen Stock Gains Despite Extended FDA Review For Alzheimer's Therapy
raw.summary: FDA extends review for Biogen's Leqembi Iqlik for early Alzheimer's disease to August 2026.

headline: FDA to reevaluate spurned cell therapy; Under-the-skin Leqembi review extended
summary: Pierre Fabre claims to now be “aligned” with U.S. regulators on the path forward for a twice-rejected treatment. Elsewhere, Argenx swapped CEOs and Blackstone made a $250 million biotech investment.

raw.headline: FDA to reevaluate spurned cell therapy; Under-the-skin Leqembi review extended
raw.summary: Pierre Fabre claims to now be “aligned” with U.S. regulators on the path forward for a twice-rejected treatment. Elsewhere, Argenx swapped CEOs and Blackstone made a $250 million biotech investment.

headline: Update on FDA Priority Review of LEQEMBI® IQLIK™ (lecanemab-irmb) Subcutaneous Injection as a Starting Dose for Early Alzheimer’s Disease
summary: TOKYO and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., May 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Eisai Co., Ltd. and Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has extended the review period by three months for the supplemental Biologics License Application (sBLA) for a once-weekly lecanemab-irmb subcutaneous injection (U.S. brand name: LEQEMBI® IQLIK™) as a starting dose for the treatment of early Alzheimer’s disease. The new Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) action date is Au

headline: Update on FDA Priority Review of LEQEMBI® IQLIK™ (lecanemab-irmb) Subcutaneous Injection as a Starting Dose for Early Alzheimer's Disease
summary: Eisai Co., Ltd. and Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has extended the review period by three months for the supplemental Biologics License Application (sBLA) for a once‑weekly lecanemab‑irmb subcutaneous injection (U.S. brand name: LEQEMBI® IQLIK™) as a starting dose for the treatment of early Alzheimer's disease. The new Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) action date is August 24, 2026.

The new Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) action date is August 24, 2026.
